findings.description: The PDF contains Elizabeth S. Werner's handwritten signature and a digital signature certification block (with DN, organization, email, and date details) on page 1. Neither the signature image nor the digital certificate text is present in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a cursive signature image and a box reading 'Digitally signed by Elizabeth S Werner / DN: cn=Elizabeth S Werner, o=DWM-Solid Waste, ou=NCDENR, email=elizabeth.werner@ncdenr.gov, c=US / Date: 2016.04.28 09:56:21 -04'00''. The HTML has no or text corresponding to this signature block.
